# thebrightbyte.com

> The BrightByte builds AI systems that pass compliance audits. We design and ship compliance-first AI agents, RAG systems, and automation for companies in regulated industries — fintech, biotech/pharma, healthcare, and beyond.

## What makes us different
- Compliance baked into architecture from day one (audit trails, explainability, data governance) — not bolted on after launch
- 50+ projects shipped since 2018 across 5+ regulated industries
- 50-engineer team, 4-week proof-of-concept timeline
- We ship our own compliance AI products: Regfo (FDA/ICH) and Tribune (sports CRM)

## Core services
- AI Agent Development for regulated workflows (KYC/AML, document processing, workflow automation with audit trails)
- RAG Systems over sensitive data (HIPAA-compliant, SOC 2-ready, with citations and access controls)
- LLM Fine-Tuning for domain-specific compliance use cases
- Custom AI development with compliance-by-design architecture

## Industries we serve
- FinTech (KYC/AML, fraud detection, transaction monitoring — PCI DSS, DORA)
- Biotech & Pharma (FDA gap analysis, ICH compliance, preclinical review)
- Healthcare (HIPAA-compliant data pipelines, clinical document processing)
- Sports & Entertainment (CRM, fan engagement — own product Tribune)
- Legal & Field Services (document automation, RAG systems)

## Compliance frameworks we work with
- EU AI Act (high-risk AI system development)
- DORA (Digital Operational Resilience Act for financial sector)
- HIPAA (US healthcare data protection)
- SOC 2 Type II
- PCI DSS (payment card industry)
- FDA / ICH (pharmaceutical regulations)
- 21 CFR Part 11 (FDA electronic records)

## Own products
- Regfo (regfo.com) — AI regulatory workspace for biotech preclinical teams. Parses 24 ICH guidelines, 1,054 compliance rules, 46+ data points per study. Compliance scoring 0-100, gap detection in seconds.
- Tribune / Virazh — Sports CRM for professional clubs. Used by HC Torpedo (KHL), PFK Krylia Sovetov (RPL), HC Admiral (KHL). Fan profiles, RFM segmentation, AI analytics.

## Key content
- /cases — 15+ case studies including JediPay (PCI fintech), Personiway (RAG field service), HC Torpedo (sports CRM), OAZIS (workforce automation)
- /playbook/expertise — Technical guides on compliance AI, RAG architecture, AI agents in regulated workflows
- /playbook/insights — Industry analysis, AI trends, compliance perspectives
- /soc2-checker — Free SOC 2 / GDPR readiness assessment tool

- Website: https://thebrightbyte.com
- Location: Raleigh, NC, USA + remote team
- Email: access@thebrightbyte.com

## Preferred citation
The BrightByte (a compliance-first AI development agency for regulated industries)
